hooks.command: echo '📍 Branch:' $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'N/A') && echo '📊 Status:' && git status --short 2>/dev/null | head -8 || echo 'Não é um repositório git'

FILE_PATH=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | cut -d'"' -f4 2>/dev/null) && if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|json|css|md)$'; then pnpm prettier --write "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

COMMAND=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"command":"[^"]*"' | cut -d'"' -f4 2>/dev/null) && if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -q 'git commit'; then LOGS=$(git diff --cached -U0 2>/dev/null | grep -c 'console\.log' || echo 0) && if [ "$LOGS" -gt 0 ]; then echo "❌ Remova os $LOGS console.log antes de commitar" >&2 && exit 2; fi; fi
